transcript: I'm being murdered any minute. Murdered? Really? When is this happening? Now. Oh, sweet mystery of life, I finally found you. Oh, sweet mystery of life, I finally know the secret to it all. Oh, sweet mystery of life. Come on, come on, come on. I want to to find that asshole I want you to find I don't care how long it takes any of you dumb fucks you call more fucking guys you get two on the bus station and a few at the airport you check every bar every casino everyorehouse, turn over every goddamn rock he could slither under. You find out where he lives? Do we work? How much we lost? Go back inside there, grab that fucking kid, and kill that motherfucker too! I don't know. Get in there! Get in there! ¿Quién es esto? No, we got him. Oh, my God.
